horoscope: You're relationship-focused today, dear Aries, and pairing up can have its rewards. It's also a strong day for focusing on the big picture and putting aside petty differences and problems, particularly in your emotional world, personal life, and home and family matters. There can be a feeling of peace with the past, along with a sense that you're truly making progress. You feel at your best now when you forgive and let go of frustration or anger. In fact, it motivates you to be a better person, and this is the kind of energy that is with you today. Good feelings tend to be reciprocated, and you may feel especially supported. It can be a great time to seek and find release for stress or strain.

The Moon moves through your work and health sector today, dear Taurus, signalling a time for handling details and getting chores done. At the same time, today's Sun-Jupiter transit encourages you to enjoy yourself. A happy balance is possible. It's a friendly transit that keeps you pleasantly alert, and a conversation with a friend or encouraging news that lifts your spirits can be in the spotlight. You may feel especially confident about a particular goal or idea. Developing and growing a project can be satisfying. It can also be an excellent time to enjoy your studies or a special interest. A friend can help you see a new, more optimistic perspective. Others reinforce or supplement your ideas in pleasant ways. Contributions from friends or networks tend to be helpful or motivating. Answers come more easily when you share your problems today.

The Moon spends the day in your joy sector, dear Gemini, and you tend to seek out pleasure and express your playful side. As well, with today’s Sun-Jupiter trine, you’re quick to find reasons to enjoy yourself. This influence connects your work and resources sectors, inspiring enthusiasm for a project, business, or financial matter, and hurdles seem smaller as a result. You may be in the right place to ask for what you want and present your ideas. Thinking up long-term plans can be fun, and your enthusiasm for a project, particularly a practical or business-related one, is building. People are interested in what you do. Cooperation seems more straightforward than usual, thanks to today's breezy energy. It's a good time for making creative changes and improvements to your life.

With today's Sun-Jupiter aspect, you're more comfortable and at ease with others, dear Cancer, and there can be some nice opportunities related to mind-expanding activities emerging. Varying your activities can help your creativity flow. You're generous, and people seem to compliment or appreciate you more than usual. Today's energies stir upbeat feelings. You're calmer and more composed than usual. There can be enthusiasm about your interests, a piece of news, or promising prospects. Recognition for past work, or excitement about revising a favorite dream/plan, can be themes. You look at the world around you, yourself, and situations with more confidence and positivity. People see your best qualities in a favorable (or new and improved) light today.

With today's Sun-Jupiter transit, you may gain support from a surprising or hidden source, dear Leo. It can open up an intimate relationship or the pipeline to your deeper self, and either way, you're making deeper connections. You can be strongly attracted to what's beneath the surface or hidden from sight right now, and you can delight in trying to solve a mystery. You feel particularly confident about your private feelings and needs, or about close relationships. It becomes quite comfortable to resolve emotional dilemmas or predicaments, or, if not fix, make peace with your problems. Some form of satisfying release may arrive for issues that have been weighing heavily on you. This is a time to see the hidden layers or elements of a situation to your advantage. The day plays in your favor on both mental and emotional planes.

With today's Moon, pacing yourself and considering practical angles to your endeavors can benefit you greatly, dear Virgo. You can be determined to boost your security. A Sun-Jupiter trine is excellent for the social side of things. Partnering or teaming up with someone can be particularly beneficial. This transit builds your confidence in your relationships and projects, and it can feel great to put your faith in something or someone. You're quite open and generous with your time and help, which helps you enhance bonds. Someone could be especially generous with you, or a relationship might improve tremendously by focusing on long-term happiness goals. Good humor and ideas are in strong focus.

With today's Sun-Jupiter harmonious aspect, you could solve a work or mechanical issue, dear Libra, and it can be a wonderful relief. Objectivity is in plentiful supply with today's Mercury aspects as well. Even so, it's a beautiful time for tapping into your intuition for work or health issues. There is an active, open, and generous spirit in play now, and you're focusing on making improvements. Aim to enjoy the benefits of cooperation. The chance to straighten out a misconception can emerge, and others seem to recognize your efforts, talents, or leadership ability. This can also be a time when you're particularly inspired by a work or wellness pursuit, project, or lifestyle adjustment. This transit promotes good feelings and optimism.

Today's transits are encouraging, dear Scorpio, especially for sharing ideas, new interests, rediscovering an old romance or friendship, and for creative and publishing projects. While the Moon in your privacy sector inclines you to some introspection, a Sun-Jupiter trine boosts your confidence. Your outlook is especially constructive and optimistic, and you project goodwill, quickly attracting others' cooperation. Your enthusiasm is building, especially along creative or romantic lines. It's a good time to enjoy with a friend and focus on light-hearted topics. Bonding, teaming up, and forgiving or building trust are themes. You are feeling more expressive than usual now, and more excited about sharing how you feel or your thoughts with others.

The Sun harmonizes with your planetary ruler today, dear Sagittarius, boosting your mood. You're enthusiastic, particularly about emotional, personal, and family matters. A positive show of support from people you care about may be in the offing. You can be eager to put something behind you. It's a strong time for thinking in terms of improvement, and you might come up with plans on what you can do to make yourself a better life. You may be looking to past projects that may have been abandoned. These could be revived with fresh thinking and a few edits. Today's transits produce flowing energy related to family or emotions, and you're likely to enjoy this atmosphere thoroughly.

Where you've been focusing on details, you prefer to look at the bigger picture today, dear Capricorn. You are building your confidence in, or enthusiasm for, a project, a course of study, an idea, or a special pursuit. You're also finding it particularly motivating that you're getting the right responses from people around you. It's a great time to open up a dialogue with a significant other or to focus on making plans or solving problems in a partnering-up or counseling scenario. Certainly, keep in mind that Mercury is retrograde, which can make complicated topics tricky, but today's transits are generous. You may meet someone new, or more likely, more fully enjoy a person who is already in your life. Connecting with and building faith in a relationship can be in focus and rewarding now.

Motivation takes hold to work and produce today, dear Aquarius. Money, business, work, and health methods are favored, and enthusiasm grows as your confidence grows. Today's Sun-Jupiter aspect occurs in your work, health, and money sectors, and while it's a light aspect, your focus can be on practical matters. Today's events give you a reason for renewed hope or optimism about finances or work. A work or self-care program can drive and inspire you. There can be a solid reason for renewed hope or optimism about finances or work today. Feeling good about what you do and about your contributions can be gently motivating.

The Sun is currently transiting your sign, dear Pisces, and as it harmonizes with lucky Jupiter today, you're giving off good vibes. You could find yourself in pleasant demand. It's an excellent time to build bridges or strengthen existing relationships. Hobbies and recreational pastimes can be in stronger focus and particularly satisfying or rewarding. You're focusing on renewal and creative refreshment, and this transit can help you feel freer to express yourself or happy to explore hobbies and other forms of expressive recreation. Rewarding feedback can be forthcoming. It can be a wonderfully creative time for you if you take a break, let things flow, and allow yourself some freedom to express yourself as you wish. Your best self shines through in what you're doing, and the day has every potential to be empowering.
